title: Karmel #3760
definition:
Carmel = "garden-land"

 1) a mountain on the Mediterranean coast of northern Israel, just
    below Haifa
 2) a town in the mountains on the west side of the Dead Sea and south
    of Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Carmel = "garden-land"

 1) a mountain on the Mediterranean coast of northern Israel, just
    below Haifa
 2) a town in the mountains on the west side of the Dead Sea and south
    of Hebron

    NASB:  a mountain promontory on the Mediterranean, also a city near Hebron
